title: How to Get Rich
overview: Cash-strapped Seven flunks a crash course in professional killing and opens a hair salon as a cover. First assignment: cut off a bride's hair.

title: Blind Your Eyes
overview: Meow, the Chief of Cats, hires Seven to wipe out an old flame. But after hearing a star-crossed interspecies love story, he attempts to make peace.

title: Seven vs. Thirteen
overview: It's scissors versus sword as Seven faces off against Thirteen. He's no match for his deft opponent — so he transforms into half a durian.

title: Assassinating Underpantsman
overview: The Island Purity Society summons Seven to kill an underwear collector, but Seven encourages everyone to embrace their differences.

title: Assassinating a Domineering Grannie
overview: Seven shape-shifts into a cardboard box and contends with a stabby, swindling fruit vendor whose grandson got a bad haircut from Seven's shears.

title: Assassinating a Pretty Girl
overview: Cola, Seven's next target, enlists his help in checking off a bucket list of mischievous deeds, but the client who hired Seven has a secret.

title: Assassinating Captain Jack
overview: On behalf of the underfunded coast guard, Seven agrees to kill the captain of a submarine that's threatening the island.

title: Bodyguard Dachun
overview: Hired by a woman to assassinate her husband, Seven confronts — and bonds with — impervious bodyguard He Dachun, who makes a heartrending sacrifice.

title: Crisis on the Island
overview: Seven teams up with islanders to stop the Prince of Stan from extracting an energy rock and destroying the island, but Stan's technology is too robust.

title: Thousand Demon Daggers
overview: Thirteen comes to Seven's aid in a heated clash with the Prince of Stan. Seven recalls his past as a prominent figure in Xuanwu.

title: Thirteen vs. Seven
overview: Thirteen seeks to deliver on her promise and destroy Seven, but she must first overcome an assassin's worst enemy — emotion.

title: Protecting Mad Bark
overview: Mad Bark is outplayed by a new killer: a guitar-strumming dog whose acoustic "Magical Sound of Sadness" strikes a lethal chord.

title: The Stan Trip
overview: With Seven's hands tied by an invisible lizard assassin, Cola convinces the Prince of Stan to take her to Stan.

title: Again, We Meet Captain Jack
overview: Captain Jack returns to settle scores with Seven, who summons the powers of the Thousand Demon Daggers.

title: Revenge of King Pheasant
overview: King Pheasant, now a special soldier for Stan, kidnaps Seven and Xiao Fei and sets out to kill Da Bao, but a ghost from the past returns.

title: Plum Blossom Eleven
overview: Seven prepares for a date with Thirteen. When he falls for a trap, he finds a way out of the bind by channeling his tonsorial qi.

title: Two Heroes
overview: Back in the past, Seven joins the Shadow Killers, faces off against Redtooth and sets out in search of the Thousand Demon Daggers.

title: Redtooth
overview: Redtooth arrives on the Island to confront Chairman Jiang, who activates the powerful White Lily Blossom with Seven's help.

title: Fate
overview: Seven reconnects with his old self, but to defeat the Blood Demon, he must harness the power of Xuanwu martial arts — and the barber within.

title: Farewell
overview: After word spreads about Seven's triumph over the Blood Demon, Seven realizes he must leave the island in order to keep its residents safe.

title: Dai Bo & Seven
overview: Da Bao sets out with Xiao Fei in search of Seven and recalls how Seven once bent over backwards to help him find an antidote.

title: Excuse Me, Is This the Xuanwu Country?
overview: Seven makes a stopover in Dali Nation, known for its beautiful people — but an overlord with dark mirror magic has turned everyone hideous.

title: Tenderness of a Tough Man
overview: Plum Blossom Eleven talks He Dachun into escorting her to Xuanwu, but Flying Bird Gate members capture her, demanding their martial arts script back.

title: Rock Hard Country
overview: Seven arrives at He Dachun's hometown, where he must win a pentathlon against the muscular Coach Chen to save Xiao Fei from being eaten.

title: Superpower Country
overview: In Superpower Country, Seven encounters Pingan, a boy with mind control powers. A searing battle with the Prince of Stern erupts.

title: Sneaking Into Xuanwu Country
overview: As Cola's life hangs by a thread, Seven sneaks into Xuanwu with Da Bao and Xiao Fei to find the medicine to cure her.

title: Master Green Phoenix's Scheme
overview: In Xuanwu, Seven faces the powerful Eyeless Sorcerer and undergoes a transformation. Thirteen struggles to choose a side.

title: Memories That You Don't Want to Forget Even in Pain
overview: Seven fends off Xuanwu assassins while under the influence of the blade's powers, as memories of life on Chicken Island begin to fade.

title: Who Is the One You Want to Protect
overview: Shadow assassin Manjusaka confronts Seven. In a true test of her powers, Thirteen engages in a heated clash with Blackbird.

title: The "Immortal" Black Bird
overview: To rescue Thirteen, Seven confronts Blackbird in a heated battle as a secret history of the Flying Bird Sect resurfaces.

title: Assassinating the Leader
overview: Green Phoenix arrives at the Shadow assassins' headquarters, where he seizes an opportunity to execute a long-awaited plan of revenge.

title: Saving Seven
overview: Dai Bo overcomes a series of hurdles to locate Seven, who is now a target of multiple powerful Shadow assassins.

title: Overnight at the Store
overview: In a convenience store on Chicken Island, Seven's friend Ordinary Assassin confronts an armed robber. But things do not go as planned.

title: Crisis on the Island 2
overview: With the arrival of White Fox, a new threat suddenly looms over Chicken Island. As Seven regains consciousness, he receives an intimidating phone call.

title: Huilian's Past
overview: In order to save a loved one, Chairman Jiang embarks on a journey to the Heaven Lily Sect, where she and Quan crossed paths a long time ago.

title: Red Tooth's Past
overview: Decades after the tragic downfall of the Heaven Lily Sect, Chairman Jiang must confront her former lover, who's been possessed by a demon.

title: The Decision
overview: While the cats and dogs of Chicken Island prepare for an attack against White Fox, Seven finds himself battling three different poisons in his body.

title: Showdown on the Chicken Island
overview: Upon arriving at Chicken Island, Prince of Stan and Cola struggle to defeat the powerful White Fox — but unexpected help is on the way.

title: Green Phoenix's Revenge
overview: Green Phoenix confronts his own fears in an effort to challenge a formidable foe. But with Thirteen held captive, he has a tough choice to make.

title: Seven's Special Mission
overview: Seven embarks on a search for his long-lost memories — overcoming countless obstacles to awaken what's been sealed in the dark shadows.

title: Return to Xuanwu
overview: As the path to regaining his memories turns perilous, Seven faces Cheap-Life Hua — who hopes their battle will awaken his true self.

title: Acting Chairman of Chicken Island
overview: Redtooth ends Chicken Island's crisis and steps up as acting director — though fear from his colleagues leaves him stuck with menial work.

title: Thumbs-Up Showdown
overview: Consumed by vengeance, Ouyang Zan challenges Seven to a duel. Yet when Seven risks his life to save bystanders, guilt takes hold of him.

title: Nine-Fingered Deadful Melody
overview: After his sword duel, Seven and Dai Bo take refuge at an inn — where an encounter with the Nine-Fingered Deadful Melody helps them escape danger.

title: Bravely Barging Into Plum Blossom Mountain Villa
overview: With the Nine-Fingered Deadful Melody's help, Seven arrives at Plum Blossom Mountain Villa — uncovering echoes of a battle fought there days earlier.

title: Reunion
overview: At Plum Blossom Mountain Villa, Seven meets Plum Blossom Thirteen, who asks to be trained — but their lesson is interrupted by looming threats.

title: Prison Break
overview: Imprisoned with He DaChun, Seven tries to escape using the Thousand Demon Daggers — only to be recognized by an old enemy eager for rematch.

title: Eyeless Master's Prophecy
overview: At a graveyard from his memories, Seven learns the shocking truth about his past from the Eyeless Sorcerer — but fate takes an unexpected turn.

title: Battle of Black Rock Mountain
overview: Risking danger, Seven disguises himself as Plum Blossom Thirteen to rescue her master — walking into a fight that'll test his resolve.
